prompt: A grid/matrix showing every student paired with every course -- like a speed dating chart. Arrows connect every person on the left to every item on the right, creating a dense web. Label: 'CROSS JOIN: everyone meets everyone'.
full_prompt: editorial illustration for a programming textbook. A grid/matrix showing every student paired with every course -- like a speed dating chart. Arrows connect every person on the left to every item on the right, creating a dense web. Label: 'CROSS JOIN: everyone meets everyone'. Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational. Simple and clear. White background. Minimal or no text in the image.
